nodes.work_statement: Implement/verify G0 Face on /Users/smith/projects/deku: truncation 40960, parse, session, no-blank, trajectory C9.1, multi-turn conduct_history always includes assembler [policy]/[wiki] zones (fix hist-or-bundle bug).
